properties.name: PLA Support Base (Djibouti)
properties.description: Ouverte aout 2017. 1re base militaire chinoise outre-mer. 2000 soldats. Quai pour porte-avions. Face a Camp Lemonnier.

properties.name: Doraleh Container Terminal
properties.description: Terminal conteneurs concede a CMHI (China Merchants). Dual-use potentiel. Arbitrage DP World 2018.

properties.name: Walvis Bay (access rumored)
properties.description: Port elargi par China Harbour Engineering. Hypothese acces militaire chinois non confirmee.

properties.name: Bata (Guinee Equatoriale)
properties.description: Projet de base militaire chinoise Atlantique rapporte 2021 (WSJ). Port elargi par CCCC.

properties.name: Maputo (appui portuaire)
properties.description: Investissements CCCC portuaires. Interet Canal Mozambique post-LNG Cabo Delgado.

properties.name: Lagos (investissements CCCC)
properties.description: Lekki Deep Sea Port (China Harbour). Acces commercial + potentielle logistique Marine PLA.

properties.name: Kribi (CCCC)
properties.description: Port construction CCCC 2018. 85% financement Exim Bank China. Dual-use potentiel.

properties.name: Beira (projet CCCC)
properties.description: Reparations+extension financees CCCC. Corridor regional. Interet chinois.
